notes: Solid snake implementation with title/pause/gameover states, level progression, high score persistence, and snake eyes detail; minor issue with Escape toggling pause instead of going to title while playing, and direction input is polled per-frame rather than queued which can cause missed inputs at high speed.
Excellent visual polish with snake eyes and gradients, but contains a state management bug where pressing Escape on the Game Over screen pauses the game instead of returning to the title.

The game looks like Snake and mostly runs, but pause/title handling is flawed because Escape toggles pause instead of reliably returning to title and held-direction input can cause unintuitive control behavior.
